ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] Here at Village Gate and while on patrolling duty, I cannot approve royal archive right until verification is complete.<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>Short note: Responses well-tailored to persona but could be more natural in tone.
